response.overview: Haunted by a voicemail from his childhood friend days before her death, Nick reunites with old friends at her funeral, while reckoning with everything left unsaid between them and uncovering what really happened.
response.tagline: Haunted by a voicemail from his childhood friend days before her death, Nick reunites with old friends at her funeral, while reckoning with everything left unsaid between them and uncovering what really happened.
response.title: I'm Sorry For Your Loss
